CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-27-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION TO DISMISS COMPLAINT FOR DELAY IN PROSECUTION; MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTIES APPEARED. COUNSEL ENTERED INTO AN AGREEMENT WHEREIN THERE WILL BE MORE REGULAR REPORTING RE LITIGATION IN MALAYSIA. BASED ON THIS REPRESENTAITON, THE MOTION TO DISMISS WAS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. HON. A JAMES ROBERTSON, II REPORTER: ERIC THRONE, CSR 7855
